nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit clarify skill that drives interactive ambiguity-reduction sessions on a feature spec, asking up to 5 targeted questions and encoding answers back into the spec file.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit constitution skill that creates or updates the project constitution from principle inputs, ensuring all dependent templates remain in sync.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit git-commit skill that auto-stages and commits all changes after a Spec Kit command completes, driven by event-based hook configuration.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit git-feature skill that creates and switches to a new feature branch using sequential or timestamp numbering conventions.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit git-initialize skill that initializes a Git repository with an initial commit if one does not already exist.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit git-remote skill that detects the Git remote URL for GitHub integration, used by issue-creation and PR workflows.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit git-validate skill that checks whether the current Git branch follows expected feature branch naming conventions.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit implement skill that executes the implementation plan by processing all tasks defined in tasks.md in dependency order.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit plan skill that executes the implementation planning workflow using the plan template to produce design artifacts.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit specify skill that creates or updates the feature specification from a natural language feature description.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit tasks skill that generates an actionable, dependency-ordered tasks.md for a feature based on available design artifacts.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit taskstoissues skill that converts tasks.md entries into dependency-ordered GitHub Issues for a feature.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit agent-context-update skill that refreshes the managed Spec Kit section inside the active coding agent context file (e.g. CLAUDE.md).

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit analyze skill that performs a non-destructive cross-artifact consistency and quality analysis across spec.md, plan.md, and tasks.md.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit checklist skill that generates custom requirement-quality checklists acting as unit tests for requirements writing on the current feature.

nodes.name: changes.py
nodes.summary: Public re-export shim for DocumentedChange and ExtractionResult, providing a stable import surface for extractor consumers without exposing the full entities module.
nodes.languageNotes: Pure re-export pattern using __all__ — no logic, just a public API alias for migration_oracle.models.entities.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty package initializer for the migration_oracle.graph namespace, making the directory a Python package without exposing any public symbols.
